name: Skillet Meatloaf Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lean ground beef in a large mixing bowl.
2. Combine the dry onion soup mix and water in a separate container.
3. Pour about half a cup of the soup mixture over the ground beef; gently mix to blend.
4. Shape the mixture into an 8-inch round patty in a large skillet.
5. Pour the remaining soup mixture over the top of the patty.
6. Cover and cook over medium heat for 25 minutes, or until cooked to desired doneness.
7. Cut the patty into 6 wedges.
8. Serve topped with hot mashed potatoes; spoon gravy over the top.
Makes 6 servings.
